description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian in a highly dynamic, action-oriented pose, with limbs extended and body leaning forward as if in mid-motion. The figure is dressed in a fitted, modern outfit with a high collar and long sleeves, complemented by tall boots. The head is adorned with short, spiked hair, and the face is partially obscured by a mask or visor. Unusual, ribbon-like extensions emanate from the arms and back, giving the impression of motion trails or stylized accessories. The overall form is elongated and stylized, with exaggerated proportions and dramatic movement, suggesting a character from an animated or graphic novel context.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian in a dynamic, action pose with extended limbs, modern fitted clothing, and dramatic ribbon-like extensions trailing from the arms and back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure lunging forward with arms outstretched, face partially visible behind a mask, and ribbon-like extensions fanning out dramatically.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated stride, the side profile of the head and mask, and the sweeping motion of the trailing extensions.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, the fitted outfit, and the full spread of the ribbon-like extensions from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the forward lean, the profile of the face and mask, and the dynamic arc of the extensions.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted modern jumpsuit with high collar and long sleeves, tall boots, and a face mask or visor
attribute_posture: dynamic lunging pose with arms and legs extended
